summary: MB-P can process structured intake, but messy operator intake still needs deterministic cleaning, URL/video policy, dynamic roadmap recovery, and agent-agnostic governance binding.

readiness_lanes.label: Messy intake cleaning
readiness_lanes.next_action: Extend deterministic verifier with typo, encoding, Telegram timestamp, and duplicate-intent cases.

readiness_lanes.label: Agent-agnostic governance binding
readiness_lanes.next_action: Add mandatory preflight and skill-attestation evidence that does not depend on one agent runtime.

readiness_lanes.label: Roadmap and session recovery
readiness_lanes.next_action: Create dynamic session roadmap fields and interruption/deviation checkpoints.

readiness_lanes.label: URL/video/source policy
readiness_lanes.next_action: Define IP-safe source intake before fetching, transcribing, or monitoring external sources.

recommended_waves: Wave 2: extend unified intake verifier with messy-intake cleaning rules.
Wave 3: add agent-agnostic intake declaration and checkpoint contract.
Wave 4: add external URL/video/source-monitoring SOP with IP gates.
